name: gallstone
description: The clinical dataset was collected from the Internal Medicine Outpatient Clinic of Ankara VM Medical Park Hospital and includes data from 319 individuals (June 2022–June 2023). The goal is to predict whether the patient has gallstones given the available measurements.

Hyperlipidemia.description: High levels of fat in the blood

Height.description: Height of the person in centimetres

Weight.description: Weight of the person in kilograms

Extracellular Fluid/Total Body Water (EC.description: Percentage of total body water that is extracellular fluid

Total Body Fat Ratio (TBFR).description: Percentage of total body weight that is fat

Lean Mass (LM).description: Percentage of total body weight that is lean mass

Total Fat Content (TFC).description: Total fat amount measured in kilograms

Visceral Fat Area (VFA).description: Visceral fat area measured in kilograms

Visceral Muscle Area (VMA).description: Visceral muscle area measured in kilograms

Hepatic Fat Accumulation (HFA).description: The level of fat accumulation in the liver

Glucose.description: Glucose level in the blood measured in mg/dL

Total Cholesterol (TC).description: Total cholesterol level in the blood measured in mg/dL

Low Density Lipoprotein (LDL).description: LDL cholesterol level in the blood measured in mg/dL

High Density Lipoprotein (HDL).description: HDL cholesterol level in the blood measured in mg/dL

Triglyceride.description: Triglyceride level in the blood measured in mg/dL

Aspartat Aminotransferaz (AST).description: AST enzyme level in the blood measured in U/L

Alanin Aminotransferaz (ALT).description: ALT enzyme level in the blood measured in U/L

Alkaline Phosphatase (ALP).description: Alkaline phosphatase enzyme level in the blood measured in U/L

Creatinine.description: Creatinine level in the blood measured in mg/dL

C-Reactive Protein (CRP).description: CRP level in the blood measured in mg/L

Hemoglobin (HGB).description: Hemoglobin level in the blood measured in g/dL

Vitamin D.description: Vitamin D level in the blood measured in ng/mL

Gallstone Status.description: Whether the person has gallstones or not
